assertionResults.fullName: normalizeUsername trims surrounding whitespace and lowercases
assertionResults.title: trims surrounding whitespace and lowercases

assertionResults.fullName: normalizeUsername handles null/undefined safely
assertionResults.title: handles null/undefined safely

assertionResults.fullName: normalizeEmail lowercases and trims non-Gmail addresses without altering local part
assertionResults.title: lowercases and trims non-Gmail addresses without altering local part

assertionResults.fullName: normalizeEmail folds Gmail dots and subaddresses (duplicate-account prevention)
assertionResults.title: folds Gmail dots and subaddresses (duplicate-account prevention)

assertionResults.fullName: normalizeEmail returns empty string for empty input
assertionResults.title: returns empty string for empty input

assertionResults.title: isValidEmailShape(no-at-symbol.com) === false

assertionResults.title: isValidEmailShape(missing@dot) === false

assertionResults.title: isValidEmailShape(spaced address@x.com) === false

assertionResults.title: isValidEmailShape() === false

assertionResults.fullName: registrationConflictResponse no conflicts returns null
assertionResults.title: no conflicts returns null

assertionResults.fullName: registrationConflictResponse username taken yields 409 USERNAME_TAKEN
assertionResults.title: username taken yields 409 USERNAME_TAKEN

assertionResults.fullName: registrationConflictResponse email taken yields 409 EMAIL_TAKEN
assertionResults.title: email taken yields 409 EMAIL_TAKEN

assertionResults.fullName: registrationConflictResponse same account on both fields yields combined CREDENTIALS_TAKEN
assertionResults.title: same account on both fields yields combined CREDENTIALS_TAKEN

assertionResults.fullName: registrationConflictResponse inactive account surfaces ACCOUNT_INACTIVE
assertionResults.title: inactive account surfaces ACCOUNT_INACTIVE

assertionResults.fullName: mapUniqueViolation non unique-violation error returns null
assertionResults.title: non unique-violation error returns null

assertionResults.fullName: mapUniqueViolation username constraint maps to USERNAME_TAKEN
assertionResults.title: username constraint maps to USERNAME_TAKEN

assertionResults.fullName: mapUniqueViolation email constraint maps to EMAIL_TAKEN
assertionResults.title: email constraint maps to EMAIL_TAKEN

assertionResults.fullName: mapUniqueViolation unknown unique violation falls back to CREDENTIALS_TAKEN
assertionResults.title: unknown unique violation falls back to CREDENTIALS_TAKEN

assertionResults.fullName: findUserForLogin (resolution logic with injected db) resolves by username first
assertionResults.title: resolves by username first

assertionResults.title: falls back to email when not a username and identifier has @

assertionResults.fullName: findUserForLogin (resolution logic with injected db) resolves by display name when a single match exists
assertionResults.title: resolves by display name when a single match exists

assertionResults.fullName: findUserForLogin (resolution logic with injected db) returns null for empty identifier
assertionResults.title: returns null for empty identifier

assertionResults.fullName: findRegistrationConflicts (injected db) returns normalized values and matched rows
assertionResults.title: returns normalized values and matched rows

assertionResults.fullName: Password hashing (bcrypt) hash is salted and never equals the plaintext
assertionResults.title: hash is salted and never equals the plaintext

assertionResults.fullName: Password hashing (bcrypt) two hashes of the same password differ (unique salts)
assertionResults.title: two hashes of the same password differ (unique salts)

assertionResults.fullName: Password hashing (bcrypt) correct password verifies and wrong password is rejected
assertionResults.title: correct password verifies and wrong password is rejected

assertionResults.fullName: JWT issuance and verification valid token round-trips and preserves claims
assertionResults.title: valid token round-trips and preserves claims

assertionResults.fullName: JWT issuance and verification token signed with a different secret is rejected
assertionResults.title: token signed with a different secret is rejected

assertionResults.title: tampered token body fails verification

assertionResults.fullName: JWT issuance and verification expired token is rejected
assertionResults.title: expired token is rejected

assertionResults.title: dotted/subaddressed Gmail variants normalise to one canonical identity
